channel.title: Advanced-Tutorial on cron.umbe.me
channel.description: Recent content in Advanced-Tutorial on cron.umbe.me

item.title: REST vs GraphQL vs gRPC: Architecture Decision Guide 2024
item.description: A battle-tested comparison of REST, GraphQL, and gRPC based on production Kubernetes benchmarks. Includes decision matrices and anti-patterns to avoid when choosing your API protocol.

item.title: Event-Driven Architecture in Pimcore with Symfony Messenger
item.description: Learn to decouple Pimcore operations using Symfony Messenger for async workflows. Covers multi-transport setup, custom event subscribers, and resilience patterns for massive data operations.
